title: Smoky Vegetable Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry made with smoky, chilled, Chinese ingredients. Great as a snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: Smoky Sauce
ingredients.notes: Available at most Chinese grocery stores

instructions: Heat a tablespoon of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped scallions and stir-fry until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the vegetables and stir-fry until they start to tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the smoky sauce and stir-fry until the vegetables are coated and the sauce is heated through.
Serve the vegetable mixture over chilled rice.
Garnish with additional chopped scallions if desired.
